name: anx-core-skill
description: Provides API capabilities for ANX markup output and CLI execution
author: ANX Team

trigger.description: When user needs to work with ANX format, convert ANX to Markdown, execute CLI commands, or generate node visualizations

actions.name: convertAnxToMarkdown
actions.description: Convert ANX content to Markdown format

actions.name: convertAnxToNodes
actions.description: Convert ANX content to nodes structure

actions.name: generateNodeVisualization
actions.description: Generate node visualization HTML and CSS

actions.name: getCliCommands
actions.description: Get list of available CLI commands
